nodes.name: George Ernest Shelley
nodes.summary: George Ernest Shelley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Somali courser、Sandy scops owl、Lilian's lovebird等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-browed mountain greenbul
nodes.summary: Black-browed mountain greenbul（Black-browed mountain greenbul，学名 Arizelocichla fusciceps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-browed mountain greenbul (Arizelocichla fusciceps), formerly the black-browed greenbul, is a species of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in south-eastern Africa from south-western Tanzania to north-eastern Zambia, Malawi and west-central Mozambique
